redstone_pearl.title: Craft Redstone Pearls (Create Teleporters Step 1) — the base quantum material from Ender Pearl + Redstone

quantum_fluid.title: Produce Quantum Fluid (Step 2) — Chorus Fruit + Water in a heated Mixer = Quantum Fluid

subtitle.text: Redstone Pearl from pearls and redstone. Quantum Fluid from Chorus and water. The chain starts here.

description: CH.17 · QUANTUM CHAIN: STEPS 1-2
▸ The Create Teleporters Quantum Mechanism chain is 5 steps.
Steps 1 and 2 are the material foundation.
Both use resources you have been farming since Ch13.
The Chorus farm you built in Ch13 feeds Step 2 indefinitely.
The Enderman farm from Ch13 feeds Step 1.
Every farm was preparation for this chain.
◈ STEP 1: REDSTONE PEARL
└ Recipe: Ender Pearl + Redstone Dust (Create crafting)
Check JEI: createteleporters:redstone_pearl
└ Material sources:
Ender Pearl: Enderman farm (Ch13 — renewable, passive)
Redstone: deep mining OR Create automation with ore processing
└ Batch target: 32+ Redstone Pearls for a full teleporter setup
└ Create automation: Mechanical Crafter → batch production
◈ STEP 2: QUANTUM FLUID
└ Recipe: Chorus Fruit + Water → Quantum Fluid
Processing: heated Mixer (Create Mixer with Blaze Burner heat)
└ Material sources:
Chorus Fruit: Ch13 Chorus farm (passive, runs itself)',
Water: Water Wheel / Fluid Tank (infinite water setup)
└ Fluid output: liquid stored in Create Fluid Tank
└ Fluid use: Steps 3-5 require Quantum Fluid as input',
(Quantum Casing assembly bath, Advanced Component process)
└ Batch target: 4+ buckets of Quantum Fluid minimum
◈ SUPPLY CHAIN REVIEW
└ Ender Pearl → Enderman farm running passively ✓
└ Chorus Fruit → Chorus farm running passively ✓
└ Redstone → automated ore processing ✓ (or manual mining)
└ Water → infinite water source + Fluid Pump ✓
└ All four inputs should be automated before this quest
(if not: automate now, before progressing to Steps 3-5)
▸ The quantum chain is built on what the End left behind.',
The Ender Pearl is the native material of the End.',
The Chorus Fruit is the crop of the End.',
You farmed the dimension to power the machine',
that lets you teleport to the dimension you farmed.',
The logistics chain is perfect and circular.',
That is good engineering.',
▶ Craft Redstone Pearls [check]
▶ Produce Quantum Fluid in a heated Mixer [check]
◇ Quantum Fluid is also the teleporter fuel — not just a crafting input.
The teleporter consumes Quantum Fluid per activation.',
Your Chorus farm output = your teleporter fuel supply.',
A larger farm = faster teleport recharge.',
Scale the farm proportional to how often you teleport.
